intro: The UN warns AI companies must disclose their soaring environmental costs, from carbon emissions to water consumption, as Antonio Guterres pushes firms toward clean power adoption. Workday faces a California lawsuit alleging its employment screening AI discriminates against job applicants, raising questions about bias in automated hiring systems. Oracle explicitly cited AI adoption in SEC filings while cutting 21,000 jobs—13% of its workforce—as it invests $55.7 billion in data centers.

whitelist.title: UN urges AI firms to come clean on their environmental costs
whitelist.desc: A UN University report warns AI’s carbon, water and land footprint is soaring, as Antonio Guterres presses AI firms to disclose costs and switch to clean power.
other_outlets: AL-MONITOR: The Middle Eastʼs leading independent news source since 2012
